---
title: "Paper Process Flowchart"
subtitle: "End-to-end map of the live build pipeline"
author: "Research Team"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This page shows the live repo pipeline in two layers. The first diagram is the quick reader-facing version. The second keeps the fuller technical dependency view for people who want the detailed build structure. For the plain-English walkthrough, see `reports/05_process_guide.qmd`.

## Quick Overview

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A["Project setup<br/>config, packages, raw-data checks"] --> B["_targets.R<br/>runs the pipeline"]

    B --> C["LiTS data ingestion<br/>harmonize 2010, 2016, 2022-23"]
    C --> D["Processed LiTS file<br/>lits_harmonized.csv"]

    D --> E["Module A<br/>descriptive mobility measures"]
    D --> F["Module B<br/>pooled associational models"]
    C --> G["Module C<br/>bounded child-module extension"]

    B --> H["HBS support layer<br/>context, linkage diagnostics,<br/>conditional appendix model"]

    E --> I["Empirical audit<br/>robustness, sample flow, claim checks"]
    F --> I
    G --> I
    H --> I

    E --> J["Saved tables and figures"]
    F --> J
    G --> J
    H --> J
    I --> J

    J --> K["Quarto reports<br/>main paper, appendix, brief, slides"]
    K --> L["Rendered outputs"]
```

This version is the best one to use in the paper process guide or when explaining the project to a non-technical reader.

## Technical Build Map

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A["Project bootstrap<br/>R/00_config.R<br/>R/01_packages.R<br/>R/02_renv_bootstrap.R"] --> B["run_pipeline.R<br/>activate local library<br/>check packages<br/>ensure project dirs"]
    B --> C["LiTS raw-data preflight<br/>assert_required_lits_inputs()"]
    C --> D["_targets.R<br/>orchestrates the build graph"]

    D --> M1["Data inventory template<br/>R/10_data_inventory.R"]
    D --> M2["Analysis locks and measure specs<br/>R/12_analysis_specs.R"]

    subgraph L["Core LiTS branch"]
        L0["LiTS raw files<br/>2010, 2016, 2022-23"] --> L1["Harmonize adult LiTS waves<br/>R/20_ingest_data.R"]
        L1 --> L2["Processed analytical file<br/>data/processed/lits_harmonized.csv"]
        L2 --> A1["Module A<br/>mobility metrics<br/>R/30_module_a_mobility.R"]
        A1 --> A2["Tier A descriptive packaging<br/>R/31_module_a_tier_a_descriptive.R"]
        A1 --> A3["save_module_a_outputs()"]
        A2 --> A4["save_module_a_tier_a_outputs()<br/>tables + figures"]
        L2 --> B1["Module B<br/>pooled associational models<br/>R/40_module_b_determinants.R"]
        B1 --> B2["save_module_b_outputs()<br/>coefficients, formulas,<br/>wave tests, Webb bootstrap"]
        L0 --> C1["Module C<br/>LiTS IV child-module extension<br/>R/50_module_c_mechanisms.R"]
        C1 --> C2["save_module_c_outputs()"]
    end

    subgraph H["Supplementary HBS branch"]
        H0["HBS raw files"] --> H1["Household context<br/>R/31_build_hbs_household_context.R"]
        H0 --> H2["Linkage diagnostics<br/>R/32_build_hbs_linkage_diagnostics.R"]
        H2 --> H3["Conditional appendix model<br/>R/33_estimate_hbs_appendix_models.R"]
        H1 --> H4["write_hbs_household_context_outputs()"]
        H2 --> H5["write_hbs_linkage_outputs()"]
        H3 --> H6["write_hbs_appendix_model_outputs()"]
    end

    subgraph Q["Audit and quality control"]
        Q1["Empirical audit<br/>R/60_empirical_audit.R<br/>sample flow, parent robustness,<br/>common-region checks, weights,<br/>claim audit"] --> Q2["save_empirical_audit_outputs()"]
    end

    D --> L0
    D --> H0
    D -. optional auxiliary input .-> P0["Admin policy panel<br/>build_policy_panel()<br/>not part of the active manuscript path"]

    L2 --> Q1
    A1 --> Q1
    B1 --> Q1
    C1 --> Q1
    H2 --> Q1
    H3 --> Q1

    M1 --> O0
    M2 --> O0
    A3 --> O0
    A4 --> O0
    B2 --> O0
    C2 --> O0
    H4 --> O0
    H5 --> O0
    H6 --> O0
    Q2 --> O0

    O0["Saved artifacts<br/>data/metadata<br/>outputs/tables<br/>outputs/figures<br/>outputs/models"] --> R1["Quarto reporting layer<br/>reports/01_start_here.qmd<br/>reports/00_main.qmd<br/>reports/10_technical_appendix.qmd<br/>reports/20_policy_brief.qmd<br/>reports/30_slides.qmd<br/>reports/05_process_guide.qmd<br/>reports/06_process_flowchart.qmd"]
    R1 --> R2["Rendered deliverables<br/>outputs/rendered/"]
```

## Reading Notes

1. `run_pipeline.R` handles setup and the LiTS raw-data preflight, then hands execution to `_targets.R`.
2. Module A and Module B both depend on `data/processed/lits_harmonized.csv`, while Module C reads the LiTS IV child-module inputs directly from the raw LiTS branch.
3. The HBS path is supplementary by design: diagnostics are built first, and the appendix model only runs if those diagnostics justify it.
4. `R/90_reporting_helpers.R` is the persistence layer that writes the CSV, PNG, and RDS artifacts later consumed by Quarto.
5. The manuscript and companion reports read saved artifacts instead of rebuilding the full estimation pipeline inside the report files.

## Layer Summary

| Layer | Main responsibility | Main files |
|---|---|---|
| Setup and orchestration | Find the project root, activate libraries, check packages, and launch the target graph. | `R/00_config.R`, `R/01_packages.R`, `R/02_renv_bootstrap.R`, `run_pipeline.R`, `_targets.R` |
| Core LiTS estimation | Harmonize adult LiTS data, estimate Modules A and B, and run the bounded Module C extension. | `R/20_ingest_data.R`, `R/30_module_a_mobility.R`, `R/31_module_a_tier_a_descriptive.R`, `R/40_module_b_determinants.R`, `R/50_module_c_mechanisms.R` |
| Supplementary HBS support | Build household context, linkage diagnostics, and the conditional appendix model. | `R/31_build_hbs_household_context.R`, `R/32_build_hbs_linkage_diagnostics.R`, `R/33_estimate_hbs_appendix_models.R` |
| Audit and persistence | Save artifacts, audit sample flow and robustness, and keep claims aligned with outputs. | `R/60_empirical_audit.R`, `R/90_reporting_helpers.R` |
| Reporting | Assemble the paper, appendix, brief, slides, and process docs from saved artifacts. | `reports/*.qmd`, `outputs/rendered/` |

## One-Sentence Summary

The live pipeline bootstraps the project environment, preflights raw LiTS inputs, runs a `targets` graph that builds LiTS and HBS evidence plus audit artifacts, and then renders publication-facing Quarto reports from those saved outputs.
